title: Stakeholder event on political advertising: agenda available now
summary: Brussels, 6 March - The EDPB organises a remote event to collect stakeholders’ input on its Guidelines on the processing of personal data to target or deliver political advertisements under the regulation on the transparency and targeting of political advertising, on 27 March 2026.
